achievements.title: Drop In a Little Dynamite There and Try 'N Cook 'Im Down
achievements.description: Complete the episode "Birthday" without losing a life and without hiding before activating each prank at least once

achievements.title: The Pain Inside a Dark Place
achievements.description: Complete the episode "Harpoon" without losing a life, while watching all pranks happen from inside the barrel without leaving it or using the prank camera
